issue_body_preview:
The current version of the REPL resolves `svelte/foo` to `unpkg.com/svelte/foo.mjs`. This will break if a new version of Svelte is released in its current form, because `svelte/foo` ought to resolve to `svelte/foo/index.mjs`.

The new version also includes `svelte/foo/package.json` which should th
test_description_zh: 在 Svelte REPL 中创建一个新的组件，尝试从 `svelte/transition`、`svelte/motion`、`svelte/store` 等子路径导入模块（例如 `import { fade } from 'svelte/transition'`），编写使用这些导入模块的代码并运行预览。
expected_result_zh: REPL 能正确解析 `svelte/foo` 形式的子路径导入，模块被正确加载，预览区域正常渲染使用了这些导入功能的组件，不出现模块解析错误或运行时报错。
